name: Salamangreat Mole
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>転生炎獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サラマングレイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>モル
desc: During your Main Phase, if you Link Summoned this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand to your zone a Link Monster points to. If you control no monsters: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 5 "Salamangreat" cards in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 2 cards. You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Mole" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase, if you Link Summoned this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand to your zone a Link Monster points to. If you control no monsters: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 5 "Salamangreat" cards in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 2 cards. You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Mole" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase, if you Link Summoned this turn: You can Special Summon this card from your hand to your zone a Link Monster points to. If you control no monsters: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 5 "Salamangreat" cards in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 2 cards. You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Mole" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
